hero.label: Software Engineer · Barcelona
hero.description: Designing and operating large-scale, data-intensive backend platforms in mission-critical environments. 5+ years delivering systems that scale.

title: Backend engineer.
Systems thinker.
paragraphs: Extensive experience designing and operating large-scale, data-intensive backend platforms in mission-critical environments. Strong focus on Python microservices, event-driven architectures, data pipelines and cloud-native systems.

Known for delivering end-to-end solutions - from architecture decisions to production monitoring - and collaborating across Product and Engineering to ensure high data quality, reliability and long-term scalability.
Active participation in internationally deployed projects contributing to large-scale, mission-critical platforms with high availability, strict performance requirements and operational SLAs.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Free-flow tolling systems - backend services & data processing for an internationally deployed, mission-critical platform
Designed and implemented backend services handling large volumes of transactional data with strict performance SLAs
PostgreSQL as core system for structured, high-integrity data management
Participated in architecture decisions for hybrid cloud and on-prem environments
End-to-end ownership: design, implementation, testing, deployment and production monitoring
Cross-functional collaboration for incident resolution, improving system reliability

jobs.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Backend development, system integrations and process automation as core focus areas
Designed, developed and maintained Python-based REST and SOAP APIs using FastAPI
Built and deployed Dockerized services with full CI/CD pipelines
RPA solutions with Selenium for automating interactions with legacy and third-party systems
Integrated multiple heterogeneous internal and external platforms, orchestrating end-to-end data flows
Improved system observability, automation and integration efficiency across the organization

jobs.title: IT Systems Administrator
bullets: Managed critical IT infrastructure: Active Directory, SQL Server, Office 365, backups and disaster recovery
Implemented security best practices, audits and monitoring using Wazuh
Linux systems administration across private and cloud environments
VoIP systems support and administration of business-critical platforms

items.description: Comprehensive computer science program covering software engineering, distributed systems, databases, algorithms and computer networks. Completed while working professionally full-time.

items.degree: Higher Technician in Network Systems Administration
items.description: Vocational training focused on IT infrastructure, network administration, systems security and server management. Foundation for the systems administration career path.

projects.title: What I've built
projects.intro: End-to-end ownership across backend systems, data pipelines and integrations in production environments.

items.title: Free-Flow Tolling Platform
items.desc: Backend platform for barrier-free tolling systems deployed internationally. Handles millions of transactional events with high availability, strict performance SLAs and real-time data processing pipelines. Hybrid cloud and on-prem architecture decisions.

items.title: System Integration & Automation Platform
items.desc: Suite of integrations between heterogeneous internal and external platforms. REST and SOAP APIs, RPA solutions with Selenium for legacy system automation, and end-to-end data flow orchestration - improving operational efficiency and reliability at scale.

items.title: Operational Back-Office Systems
items.desc: Design, development and evolution of back-office operational systems supporting core business workflows - incident management, operational monitoring and day-to-day business processes. Focus on observability, reliability and long-term maintainability.

aiProjects.title: AI side projects
aiProjects.intro: Personal explorations around LLM-enabled backend systems, automation and data pipelines.

items.title: RAG Document Assistant
items.desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that ingests technical documentation (PDFs, Markdown) and exposes a conversational API. Uses pgvector on PostgreSQL for vector storage - leveraging existing database expertise - and LangChain for orchestration. Designed with production concerns in mind: chunking strategies, hybrid search (semantic + keyword), and response streaming via FastAPI.

items.title: Operational AI Agent
items.desc: Autonomous agent built with LangChain tool-calling that automates multi-step operational workflows: reads from APIs, queries databases, generates structured reports and dispatches actions. Evolved naturally from prior RPA and process automation experience - replacing brittle Selenium scripts with LLM-driven reasoning. Includes a Redis-based memory layer for session persistence across interactions.

items.title: Event Stream Processor + LLM Enrichment
items.desc: Data pipeline that consumes events from Apache Kafka, applies LLM-based enrichment (entity extraction, classification, anomaly flagging) and persists enriched records to PostgreSQL. Orchestrated with Apache Airflow. Built to explore AI-augmented data pipelines as a natural evolution of existing backend pipeline experience. Includes a minimal Grafana dashboard for pipeline observability.
